## Checklist

- [ ] Skill files follow the YAML frontmatter format in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, IPs, or org-specific data
- [ ] Tested against a FortiSIEM instance (version: ___)
- [ ] Updated SKILLS_SUMMARY.md if adding a new skill
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md
